titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Stephanie Spangler, Deputy Provost for Biomedical and Health Affairs, Yale University, Records
Stephanie Spangler, Deputy Provost for Biomedical and Health Affairs, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday March 18, 2025 at 06:34

did.unittitle: Stephanie Spangler, deputy provost for biomedical and health affairs, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, committee and planning documents, and project and procedure files maintained by Dr. Stephanie Spangler as deputy provost for biomedical and health affairs at Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 3-B (YRG 3-B), Records of Yale deputy, associate, and assistant provosts.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Provost's Office, 2007.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Stephanie Spangler, Deputy Provost for Biomedical and Health Affairs, Yale University, Records (RU 1057). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, committee and planning documents, and project and procedure files maintained by Dr. Stephanie Spangler as deputy provost for biomedical and health affairs at Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The records are closed until 35 years from the end of the tenure of Deputy Provost Stephanie Spangler due to University policy set by the Yale Corporation.

did.unittitle: Yale Green Fund Procedures and Approved Projects

odd.head: General
odd.p: Box 5, Folders 102-121 returned permanently to the Office of the Provost, 2015.

did.unittitle: Committee on Cooperative Research Patentsand License
Guidelines for Investigators the HIC Committee
Financial COI Clinical Research GAO Study
Other Support for PIS w/managed COI
